tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check MCP server health status. Verify this server is operational and get basic server information (name, version, auth method). Use for connectivity testing and diagnostics. No authentication required.

tools.name: submit_entities
tools.description: Submit companies for address verification or hierarchy creation. Submit companies/organizations for address verification or organizational hierarchy analysis. Returns entity IDs for tracking.

tools.name: get_request_status
tools.description: Get screening request status and results. Check if request is complete (PENDING/PROCESSING/COMPLETE/FAILED) and retrieve results (HIERARCHY, VERIFICATION, TS). Returns organizational hierarchy, company verification, or sanctions screening data.
